identity_baseline: Powerful Martian ruler and high-ranking nobility of Zodanga.
stable_visual_summary: Than Kosis is an elder male Martian ruler characterized by a commanding, authoritative presence. He is visually defined by his status as the Jeddak of Zodanga, typically appearing in regal, high-ranking noble regalia and royal garments that signify his leadership and power.
costume_signature: Royal Zodangan regalia and authoritative attire of a Jeddak.
continuity_constraints: Must always maintain a regal, high-ranking noble silhouette when appearing as the Jeddak.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific physical build and exact facial features are not described.
Exact color or material of the Zodangan regalia is unknown.
